page.html:
Like other creative people, I get inspiration from many different sources: art, music, cinema, science, computers, technology, etc. My work and artistic expression is an elaborate interpretation of these things - sometimes it can be a slight modification or a pure integration into another module or piece. Other times it can be the canvas from where I start to create. In any case, I am grateful to credit the authors and share their valuable work with everyone.

  • Website powered by GatsbyJS, ReactJS and Github pages
  • Custom template based on the Gatsby-starter-hero-blog
  • Navigation UX and design based on Swiftype’s old design
  • Home page elevator pitch inspired by James McLeod
  • Custom search engine and ads powered by Algolia and Google Adsense
  • Skills demo powered by Box2d physics library and PlankJS
  • Inspired by TheFWA, Hèctor Monerris, Alicante Frontend, Kirainet, Pepo Lluis Manen, Mr.doob, Emanuele Feronato, Memo Akten, MartosRubio and Momardi
